h1.visual_description: Not explicitly present as a section header on this page; inferred as bold, centered, larger font for chapter titles based on header metadata.

h2.visual_description: Bold, serif font, inline with the start of a paragraph, used for formal definitions.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Italicized block label for supplementary notes or observations.
Bold block label for formal mathematical or logical definitions.
Bullet point for unordered list items.
Equation reference number, right-aligned on the same line as display math.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX (inline using $...$, display using $$...$$ or equation environments)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: DOI-based header; body text uses standard academic prose with mathematical notation.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top margin contains document title and DOI link; bottom margin contains a numeric page identifier (e.g., '317').
